tagline: Service Principal monitoring display: The user column in the Monitoring page now shows the Service Principal ID when a service principal is used, instead of displaying as empty.
what_it_does: Service Principal monitoring display: The user column in the Monitoring page now shows the Service Principal ID when a service principal is used, instead of displaying as empty. Genie API suggested questions fix: Fixed an issue where messages sent through the API didn't return suggested questions. Genie Research Agent (Beta) architecture update: Research Agent (Beta) now has a single reasoning agent that generates hypotheses and SQL.
why_it_matters: This helps Research Agent follow instructions more effectively, produce more concise reports, and deliver answers with lower latency.
